Distributes data based on server capacity and current load.

Checks and updates the health status of all servers.

Manages cloud infrastructure integration with AWS for the LoadBalancer.

Distributes data using consistent hashing.

Generates a hash value for a given key using the MD5 algorithm.

I

importServerLogs(String, String) - Method in class core.LoadBalancer
Imports server logs asynchronously from a file in the specified format.

Imports server logs from a file into a LoadBalancer.

Initializes cloud integration with AWS and starts cloud-based scaling.

Initializes cloud servers using AWS Auto Scaling.

isHealthy() - Method in class core.Server
 

L

leastLoaded(double) - Method in class core.LoadBalancer
Distributes data to the least loaded healthy servers.
LoadBalancer - Class in core
Manages server load balancing, distribution, failover, and cloud scaling.
LoadBalancer() - Constructor for class core.LoadBalancer
Initializes a new LoadBalancer with monitoring enabled.
logAlert(String) - Method in class core.LoadBalancer
Logs an alert message to the alert log.

P

predictiveLoadBalancing(double) - Method in class core.LoadBalancer
Distributes data based on predicted future load.

R

roundRobin(double) - Method in class core.LoadBalancer
Distributes data evenly across healthy servers using the round-robin strategy.
run() - Method in class core.ServerMonitor
Executes the server monitoring loop.

S

scaleCloudServers(int) - Method in class core.LoadBalancer
Scales the number of cloud servers to the desired capacity.
scaleServers(int) - Method in class core.CloudManager
Scales the number of cloud servers to the desired capacity.
Server - Class in core
Represents a server with dynamic metrics and cloud status, managed by the LoadBalancer.
Server(String, double, double, double) - Constructor for class core.Server
 
serverMap - Variable in class core.LoadBalancer
Map of server IDs to server instances, synchronized for thread safety.
ServerMonitor - Class in core
Monitors the health and performance of servers in the LoadBalancer.
ServerMonitor(LoadBalancer) - Constructor for class core.ServerMonitor
Constructs a ServerMonitor instance tied to a LoadBalancer.
servers - Variable in class core.LoadBalancer
List of active servers, thread-safe with synchronized access.

setCloudInstance(boolean) - Method in class core.Server
 
setHealthy(boolean) - Method in class core.Server
 
setWeight(double) - Method in class core.Server
 
shutdown() - Method in class core.CloudManager
Shuts down all cloud resources.
shutdown() - Method in class core.LoadBalancer
Gracefully shuts down the load balancer.
stop() - Method in class core.ServerMonitor
Stops the monitoring loop, allowing the thread to terminate gracefully.
